name: Spicy Peanut Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 Stalk fresh lemon grass, finely chopped
1 tbsp Palm sugar or brown sugar
1 cup Thin coconut milk (prepared from 1 can Unsweetened coconut milk)
recipeInstructions:
1. Use this spicy peanut sauce with all types of Thai-flavored noodles or grilled meats.
2. In a saucepan, sauté shallots, garlic, and lemon grass until soft.
3. Add red curry paste and cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
4. Add peanut butter, palm sugar, fish sauce, and coconut milk.
5. Cook over medium heat until thick (about 15 minutes). If it is too thick, add water to adjust consistency.
6. Pour into a shallow bowl.
7. To prepare thin coconut milk: Pour 1 can unsweetened coconut milk into a tall glass. Allow to sit for at least 1 hour so the thick cream rises to the top. Skim off the top (cream) and set aside. The remaining liquid is thin coconut milk.
8. Makes 1 1/2 Cups
